title: Shield Upgrades
body:
# Shield Upgrades [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1327308441324097681?label=discord&color=blue&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC)  [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/shield-upgrades?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/shield-upgrades)  [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/lullaby6/data-packs)](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE) ![bg](https://i.imgur.com/NBMQq99.png) ## 📖 Description New 9 special and powerful shields! Collect ultra-rare materials to craft shields that will give you a strategic advantage, and players will have to research which new shield best suits their playstyle. These new shields will take PvP and PvE to a whole new level! When a player obtains a shield, they unlock all shield recipes. Also check [Armor Upgrades](https://modrinth.com/datapack/armor-upgrades)!
## 🛡️ Shields, Stats and Recipes All new shields have the double of durability than a normal shield.
Shield of Undying This shield is like a Totem of Undying!

📃 Stats

  • +2 Max Health

🛠️ Recipe

Fire Shield This shield apply fire to mob attackers!

📃 Stats

  • +0.2 Attack Speed
  • -2 Burning Time

🛠️ Recipe

Ender Shield This shield is inmune to end's void!

📃 Stats

  • +0.02 Speed

🛠️ Recipe

Ocean Shield

📃 Stats

  • +2 Max Health
  • +0.5 Water Movement Efficiency
  • +10 Oxygen Bonus
  • +2 Submerged Mining Speed

🛠️ Recipe

Dune Shield

📃 Stats

  • +0.25 Entity Interaction Range
  • +0.5 Block Interaction Range

🛠️ Recipe

Warden Shield

📃 Stats

  • +2 Attack Damage
  • +0.5 Sneaking Speed

🛠️ Recipe

Netherite Shield

📃 Stats

  • +2 Armor
  • +1 Armor Toughness
  • +1 Knockback Resistance

🛠️ Recipe

Wither Shield This shield apply wither effect to mob attackers!

📃 Stats

  • +1 Attack Damage
  • +0.1 Attack Speed

🛠️ Recipe

Sword Shield This shield is a sword!

📃 Stats

  • +10 Attack Damage (When in Main Hand)

🛠️ Recipe

--- ## ⌨️ Commands Give: ```mcfunction /loot give @s loot shield_upgrades: ``` --- ## 🪪 License [AGPL-3.0-or-later](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE) --- ## 👾 Bugs/Issues Please report any problem/bug/issues in the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC). --- ## 💌 Donate - [Donate on Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/lullaby45743) - [Donate on PayPal](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/lucianobrumer) --- ## 🎁 Server Hosting Creating your own server can be a very lengthy, tedious and costly process.
